---
title: "Shiny App — User Guide"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
---

> *(placeholder)* A walkthrough of the application and how to use each tab.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Launch the app
👉 [Open the Team HeeHaa Shiny App](https://example.shinyapps.io/REPLACE-ME/){target="_blank"}
*(placeholder link — replace once deployed)*
:::

## Getting started

_How to open the app and what the landing tab shows._

## The four tabs

### 1. Activity & Abnormality
_What it shows and the controls (date range, baseline slider, agent filters, time)._

![](images/prototype_activity.png)

### 2. The Bypass
_..._

![](images/prototype_bypass.png)

### 3. Network
_..._

![](images/prototype_network.png)

### 4. Topics & Evidence
_..._

![](images/prototype_evidence.png)

## Tips

_The baseline slider on the Activity tab affects every tab; all other inputs are local._
